name: IA 个人口头
subject: english
domain_name: 评估任务 / Assessment Components / Assessment
curriculum_points: Students will be able to deliver a structured, 10-minute oral presentation that analyses the relationship between a global issue and the content and form of one literary and one non-literary text.
Students will be able to engage in a thoughtful, spontaneous discussion with the teacher, demonstrating the ability to expand upon and defend their analysis in response to probing questions.
